sections.label: Pallavi
sections.ta:
திருமயிலை நாயகியே கருணை வடிவான கற்பகமே
வருவாயே விழைந்த வரங்கள் தருவாயே
sections.translit:
thirumayilai nAyakiyE karuNai vadivAna kaRpagamE
varuvAyE vizhaindha varangaL tharuvAyE
sections.en: Oh, Queen of sacred Mylapore and personification of compassion, please come and grant our prayers.

sections.label: Anupallavi
sections.ta:
ஆதவன் சுடரொளி மாதவன் சோதரி
நாதத்தின் முன்னொலி நற்கதி அருளிடும் நளினி
sections.translit:
Adhavan sudaroLi mAdhavan sOdhari
nAdhatthin munnoli naRgathi aruLidum naLini
sections.en: Comparable in radiance to the bright Sun and sister of Mahavishnu, you are the ultimate sound that preceded melodious music, and the goddess that bestows the path to salvation.

sections.label: Charanam
sections.ta:
கனலிடை ஜனித்த கந்தனின் அன்னை நீ கமல நயனீ
பரிந்தே பார்த்தனின் உயிர் காத்த சாயே விரைந்தே வந்தென் தாயே
மகேசன் மனங்கவர் மாயே தயை புரிவாயே
அடியவன் என் சிரமதில் இணையடி கமலம் வைத்தே
sections.translit:
kanalidai janittha kandhanin annai nI kamala nayanI
parindhE pArtthanin uyir kAttha chAyE viraindhE vandhen thAyE
magEsan manangkavar mAyE dhayai purivAyE
adiyavan en siramadhil iNaiyadi kamalam vaitthE
sections.en: Oh tender Goddess, you are the mother of Skanda who was born from flame, and you are the same Chaya or shadow (Vishnu Durga) who rushed to protect the life of Arjuna with empathy. Won’t you, Goddess Maya and darling of Maheswara, hasten and place your incomparable lotus feet on my head, and bless me?

notes: Reference is made in the charanam to the generally held belief (including that of the present author) by Devi upasakas that all tricks or leelas or illusory mayas performed by Krishna in the Kurukshetra war were due to the divine powers of yogamayi or mahamayi. Charanam in this song has a line indicating that Goddess Parvathi or Durga saved the life of Arjuna in the Kurukshetra war. When Arjuna had to kill Jayadhrata on a day lest he had to end his life, clouds in the sky cover the sun by a mystical act of Lord Krishna. All such magical incidents in Mahabharata war are acts of Vishnu Durga acting on Lord Vishnu’s idea or thought. Arjuna kills Jayadhrata Also see: Jayadhrata's life and death The narration that Vishnu’s powers made the sun set has been interpreted by several people in differ
